game_name: Bulls vs. Lakers and the NBA Playoffs

design_philosophy.core_loop: Select plays, execute basketball strategy, manage player stamina across playoff series
design_philosophy.primary_tension: Adapting offensive/defensive schemes against opponent patterns while managing fatigue
design_philosophy.player_fantasy: Coach and play as NBA stars during high-stakes playoff competition
design_philosophy.what_makes_it_opinionated: Authenticity-focused sports simulation prioritizing strategic depth over arcade accessibility; emphasizes real NBA rosters and playoff structure over pick-up-and-play gameplay

difficulty.continues_system: Series-based progression; playoff elimination structure serves as natural failure state
difficulty.checkpointing: Game progress saved between playoff rounds; series resets on elimination
difficulty.player_agency_in_difficulty: Play selection and offensive/defensive scheme customization allows players to adjust approach; opponent AI difficulty may scale based on series progression

progression.upgrade_system: Player roster management and fatigue recovery between games
progression.unlock_mechanism: Advance through NBA Playoff bracket by winning successive series; different paths available based on initial team selection (Bulls or Lakers)
replayability_hooks: Two distinct starting teams with different rosters and playoff paths
Varying opponent team strategies across series

world_building_techniques: Authentic NBA team rosters and logos
Real playoff bracket structure reflecting 1992 season

faction_indicators: Chicago Bulls vs. Los Angeles Lakers rivalry
environmental_storytelling: Arena presentation reflects authentic NBA venues
Playoff progression visualized through bracket advancement
